extName.description: Extension name. Keep as-is across locales.

extDescription.message: Unify Enter, Ctrl+Enter, and Shift+Enter behavior across social and chat sites (X, Reddit, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, and more).

popupSendMode.description: Popup section heading above the two mode radio buttons.

popupSuffixSends.description: Suffix after a key-combo chip: [Ctrl][+][Enter] sends

popupSuffixNewline.description: Suffix after a key-combo chip: [Enter] inserts newline

popupShowHint.message: Show hint bubble on supported sites

popupSupportedSites.description: Popup section heading above the per-site enable list.

popupStatusActive.description: Popup header when current tab is a supported and enabled site.

popupStatusDisabled.description: Popup header when current tab is supported but user has switched it off.

popupStatusUnsupported.description: Popup header when current tab is not in the platform list.

popupNativeCtrlEnter.description: Small hint next to a site name in the list, showing what the site does by default.

popupNativeEnter.description: Small hint next to a site name in the list, showing what the site does by default.

hintLabelSend.description: Row label in the on-page hint bubble.

hintLabelNewline.description: Row label in the on-page hint bubble.

hintNoteDisabled.message: disabled on this site — showing native behavior
hintNoteDisabled.description: Hint footer note shown when the site is toggled off.

hintNoteError.message: override attempt errored — falling back to native
hintNoteError.description: Hint footer note shown when a send-button click or key-event synthesis failed.

hintNoteNative.description: Hint footer note shown when the chosen mode matches the site's native behavior.

hintDismiss.description: Accessible label for the hint bubble's close (×) button.
